framework.name: A2A (Agent-to-Agent Protocol) - Multi-Agent Coordination
framework.description: Google's protocol launched April 2025 for standardizing how AI agents discover, communicate, and delegate tasks across platforms. Uses agent cards (JSON files), JSON-RPC over HTTP/SSE, and includes built-in authentication/encryption. Backed by 50+ industry partners including Salesforce, Accenture, Uber.
framework.raw_quote: A2A or agent-to-agent protocol is Google's big move. Launched in April 2025 with over 50 industry partners like Salesforce, Accenture, and Uber. A2A is about AI agents talking to each other.
